title: Two-Way Automations
excerpt: Currently automations are created for one-way movement. Ex: When status is complete move to Done Group". But, what if the status changes? Current process is to either manually move the item, or create another automation …

posts.author: heidi.ranga (Heidi Ranganathan)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently automations are created for one-way movement. Ex: When status is complete move to Done Group". But, what if the status changes? Current process is to either manually move the item, or create another automation “Ex: When status is ready move to Active” to bring it back to its original location. Similar to the check mark function when mirroring and linking project boards, would be useful to have the option to create a one way or two way connection.
